name: Yakuza RPG
description:
Welcome to Japan, where the vibrant lights of Kamurocho illuminate a world of intrigue, danger, and opportunity. This immersive Yakuza RPG places you at the centre of a gripping narrative set in 2013, amidst the volatile power struggles of Japan’s criminal underworld. Explore a richly detailed world inspired by the Yakuza game series, where every decision you make will shape your story. Whether you choose loyalty, deception, or a path uniquely your own, your journey into the heart of Kamurocho begins now.

commissioned bot
creator: BorutaDevil
